meaning: n.(鸟翼在飞行中的)一扑棱,(鸟翼似的)一扑闪
examples: When mosquitoes fly, their wing would produce continuous wingbeat sounds.
No one knows, but the legend says that you will be able to hear a butterfly's wingbeat.
He found that the birds are, for a substantial part of the wingbeat cycle, forced into the incline.
